description: Market capitalization of the company at the snapshot date, denominated in USD
Patent-based innovation composite score derived from firm-level patent analytics; delivered as a raw cross-sectional z-score for use prior to any custom neutralization
Innovation relevance comparing the most recent 1 year of patenting with the company’s 1-year historical patent technology footprint
Neutralized innovation relevance between recent 1 year and prior 1-year footprint; cross-sectional z-score neutralized for sector, market cap, volatility, and momentum
Similarity between the recent 1 year of patent output and the technological footprint established over the preceding 3 years
Neutralized innovation relevance comparing recent 1-year output to a 3-year historical base; cross-sectional z-score neutralized for sector, market cap, volatility, and momentum
Alignment between a company’s recent 3-year innovation output and its patent technology footprint from the prior 3-year period
Neutralized innovation relevance across matching recent 3-year and past 3-year periods; cross-sectional z-score neutralized for sector, market cap, volatility, and momentum
Alignment between the most recent 1 year’s innovation output and the company’s prior 5-year historical patent footprint
Neutralized innovation relevance comparing recent 1-year output to a 5-year historical base; cross-sectional z-score neutralized for sector, market cap, volatility, and momentum
Alignment between the recent 3 years’ innovation output and the company’s prior 5-year historical patent footprint
Neutralized innovation relevance comparing recent 3-year output to a 5-year historical base; cross-sectional z-score neutralized for sector, market cap, volatility, and momentum
Alignment between the recent 5 years’ innovation output and the company’s prior 5-year historical patent footprint
Neutralized innovation relevance comparing recent 5-year output to a 5-year historical base; cross-sectional z-score neutralized for sector, market cap, volatility, and momentum
